headline: T. Rowe (TROW) Price Reports $1.80T in AUM for February, Launches Emerging Markets Research ETF
summary: T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:TROW) is included among the 15 Best Dividend Leaders to Buy Right Now. On March 11, T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:TROW) reported that its assets under management at the end of February totaled $1.80 trillion. That was slightly higher than the $1.79 trillion reported at the end of the […]

headline: Will T. Rowe Price's (TROW) New Emerging Markets ETF Shift Its Active Management Narrative?
summary: T. Rowe Price Group recently launched the T. Rowe Price Emerging Markets Equity Research ETF (TEMR), an actively managed, fully transparent fund targeting long-term capital growth across 180–280 emerging markets holdings, now trading on NYSE Arca with a 0.40% net expense ratio and co-managed by six senior research leaders. This ETF extends the firm’s structured research approach from its U.S. and international equity research ETFs into emerging markets at a time when T. Rowe Price is...
